abilities.name: Elemental Interference
abilities.text: Enemy models within 6" of this model must discard a card to cheat fate in duels with friendly elementals.

abilities.name: U Incorporeal
abilities.text: Reduce damage dealt to this model by 1. Damage from ✝ actions may not be reduced this way.

actions.name: Absorb Energy
actions.effects: Deal this action's damage to a different enemy model within 6" of the target. This model heals 1 for each model damaged this way.

triggers.name: Essence Transfer
triggers.text: Deal 2 irreducible damage to this model. Another ally within range heals 2.

triggers.name: Drain Magic
triggers.text: Target discards a card. This model may draw a card and then discard a card.

actions.name: Power Blast
actions.effects: Move the target up to 5" directly away from this model. If this move is interrupted, the target and all models in base contact with it must pass a TN 12 Df duel or be dealt 2 damage.

actions.name: Instill Form
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Reduce the number of (fortitude) this model needs to drain to declare this action by an amount equal to the turn number.
actions.effects: Replace this model with a golem Academic model. Then, the new model heals 2.

actions.name: Tap the Leyline
actions.effects: Draw two cards and then discard one card.
